description: Use this dashboard to explain the latest Brent and WTI actuals, the next three forecast points, and the benchmark spread.
suggested_questions: What does the next three-month outlook say?

metric_definitions.Brent: Brent crude oil spot price in dollars per barrel.
metric_definitions.WTI: West Texas Intermediate crude oil price in dollars per barrel.
metric_definitions.forecast_change_3m: Difference between the latest actual and the final forecast point over the next three months.
